searchPrompt: o pali e nimi o pana e ona.
quit: o pini e ilo Kiyoshi Music
animationsDesc: ni li lawa e ijo tawa
highContrastDesc: ni la kule li ante suli tawa lukin pona
appFontDyslexicDesc: ni li pona tawa lukin nasa
autoplayDesc: kalama open li pini la kalama kama li open
discordRpcDesc: ilo Discord li ken sona e kute sina
translationFontSize: suli pi sitelen pi toki ante
lyricsProvidersDesc: nasin pi tan toki. mi alasa e toki kepeken ni lon nasin ni.
cacheClearAll: o weka e sona awen ale
cacheCleared: mi weka e sona awen ale
shortcutsNote: sina pali ala e nimi la sina ken ni.
scMute: o ken / ken ala e kalama
scToggleLyrics: o lukin / lukin ala e toki kalama
loginButton: o kepeken sijelo pi lipu YouTube Music
loginHint: sijelo ilo linluwi li kama open. o kepeken sijelo sina la mi kepeken e kepeken sina
loginWaitingDesc: o kepeken sijelo sina pi lipu YouTube Music lon sijelo ilo kama. sina kepeken la ona li pini.
oauthInstruction: o open e lipu ilo Google. o pana e nimi ni tawa ona, tawa ni: ilo Kodama li ken kepeken e sijelo YouTube Music sina:
oauthNotConfigured: sijelo Google li lon ala lon nasin ilo ni.
oauthError: kepeken sijelo li pakala. o kepeken sin.
oauthDenied: ken li weka. kepeken sijelo li pini.
oauthExpired: nimi li pini. o kepeken sin.
ffmpegNeededDesc: ilo FFmpeg li lon ala. ona li kama wan. ona li kepeken tawa pana kalama MP3.
ffmpegDownload: o kama jo e ilo FFmpeg
ffmpegConnectionLost: linluwi tawa ilo pi monsi li pakala.
removeAccountTitle: sina wile ala wile weka e sijelo?
noLyricsHint: sina ken pali e toki kalama kepeken ilo ni:
deletePlaylistConfirm: sina wile ala wile weka e kulupu ni?
refetchLyrics: o alasa kin e toki kalama
unisonIdentityDesc: o pana e toki kalama tawa Unison kepeken nimi sina. nimi ni li sina — o awen e ona.
unisonNoIdentity: jan li lon ala. o pali e sin anu o kama jo e lipu nimi sina (ona li ken kepeken Better Lyrics).
unisonNameDerived: nimi sina li kama tan nimi pi ilo sina (sama Better Lyrics).
unisonNicknameDesc: o pana e nimi sina. sitelen mute en nanpa en _, 3–20.
unisonNicknameInvalid: 3–20 sitelen. sitelen anu nanpa anu _ taso.
unisonNicknameTaken: jan ante li jo e nimi ni.
composerAutocacheDesc: ilo li awen e kalama pi ilo Composer. tan ni la kalama sama li open kepeken tenpo lili. ona li pana e mute lon poki kalama.
unisonNeedIdentity: o pali e jan Unison sina lon open (ilo → Lyrics).
unisonVoteError: wile sina li ken ala awen.
translateLyrics: o ante toki e toki kalama
importLyrics: o kepeken toki kalama tan lipu (.lrc / .ttml)
removeCustomLyrics: o weka e toki kalama lipu
noFfmpeg: ilo FFmpeg li lon ala. ni li wile e ona.
updateAvailable: ilo Kiyoshi Music sin li lon
upToDate: ilo Kiyoshi Music li sin nanpa wan
downloadUpdate: o kama jo e ilo Kiyoshi Music sin
checkForUpdates: o alasa e ilo Kiyoshi Music sin
hideExplicit: o lukin ala e kalama pi toki ike
hideExplicitDesc: ni la sina lukin ala e kalama pi sitelen "E"
lyricsCopied: toki kalama li lon jo nimi!
lrcSaved: mi awen e lipu pi toki kalama!
pinProtectionDesc: ni la, sina wile ante e ante nasin la o pana e nanpa pi suli tu tu.
pinEnterPrompt: o pana e nanpa awen tawa open
pinConfirmNew: o pana kin e nanpa sin
pinWrong: nanpa ni li ike. o pana e nanpa ante.
pinMismatch: nanpa tu li sama ala. ona o sama.
pinChangeDesc: ni la sina ken awen e ante kepeken nanpa ante.
pinEmergencyDesc: sina sona ala e nanpa / nimi awen la, o pilin luka tu pi tenpo lili e sitelen pi ilo awen lon lipu awen. ni li weka e awen.
pinForgot: sina pini ala pini sona e nanpa / nimi?
pinEmergencyConfirmText: sina wile ala wile ni? ni la ante nasin li pini awen.
pinTypeDesc: sina wile awen kepeken nanpa anu nimi?
overlayEnableDesc: ni li pana e lipu tawa linluwi sina tawa ni: ilo OBS li ken kepeken ona
overlayPortDesc: ni li nanpa poki pi pana lipu (nanpa tan: 9848)
overlayUrlDesc: o pali e tan linluwi lon ilo OBS kepeken nimi ni
overlayObsHint: ilo OBS la: o pali e tan → tan linluwi → o pana e nimi lon sewi. suli ona o sama suli lipi.
overlayWidgetHeightHint: lili 0 la suli sewi li sama jo
overlayAutoHideDesc: kalama ala li open la lipu li weka
overlayScrollTitleDesc: nimi li suli a la ona li tawa
overlayProfileExport: o awen e nasin tawa lipu
overlayLocalUnavailable: nasin sitelen lon ilo li ken ala
overlayLocalUnavailableDesc: ilo linluwi sina li ken ala kepeken nasin sitelen lon ilo, anu sina ken ala e kepeken.
contributeTranslation: sina ken pona e ante toki lon lipu Crowdin
